title: Project link section parser and validator

source.subject: feat(analysis): add project link section + parser/validator

body:
Analysis parses and validates **Project.proj** link sections for foreign libraries and mod references.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`abb7bd4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/abb7bd4)
- **Subject:** feat(analysis): add project link section + parser/validator
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-mods`
- **Domain:** `compiler`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-merge-wave`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling delivery** (`v03-merge-wave`).
